active_checklist: Lane 1: make the target local Kanboard project structurally ready for sync. Own new bootstrap/column-map files and bootstrap tests. Do not edit live-sync implementation files unless unavoidable.

lane_claim: Manager lane 1: bootstrap/verify Kanboard project, columns, swimlane assumptions, and local column-map artifact. Workers are optional only for independent sidecars with disjoint write sets.

items.title: Inspect local Kanboard endpoint/project/column discovery surfaces without exposing secrets
Implement or document a repeatable bootstrap command for project and columns
Produce deterministic local column-map artifact for status-to-column mapping
Add focused tests for column-map/status mapping behavior
Return ZKP summary, changed files, validation, and residual gaps
